statement: In every magma, Equation 3251 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * u) * u`) implies Equation 2230 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (w * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0511
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) u) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op w w))
